creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
sysutils/ipmitool can't be build on sparc64 arch (and all other big endian architectures).
There is a patch available for this problem on ipmitool the bug tracker:
http://sourceforge.net/tracker/?func=detail&aid=3564701&group_id=95200&atid=610550

And here the patch for the port.

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: build sysutils/ipmitool on sparc64
